item.title: Silent catch blocks in secure/ swallow errors with no logging
item.intent: No error in the secure/ module is silently discarded. Scanner and audit failures must be logged. A scanner that silently fails is indistinguishable from a clean scan.
item.description: 12+ catch blocks across the secure/ module swallow errors silently. Key locations: src/secure/scanner/git.ts (lines 37,50,69 — git history scan errors), src/secure/scanner/walk.ts (lines 41,62,70 — file walk errors), src/secure/audit/logger.ts (lines 59,88,118,148,184,216 — audit log write failures), src/secure/credentials/probes.ts (line 185 — credential probe failures). The audit/logger.ts instances are particularly critical — if audit log writes fail silently, the tamper-evident audit trail has invisible gaps. Steps: (1) search secure/ for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns; (2) for each non-fatal catch, add console.warn() or structured log call with the error and context; (3) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep fallback behaviour, just add logging. Scope: ~12 one-line additions across secure/.
